summary.shape_sentence: Failed open and midday recovery resolved into a sustained afternoon liquidation, closing weak near the session lows.

goat.note: Sustained afternoon liquidation from roughly 26095 toward 25910, with lower highs and shallow countertrend bounces.

red_circles.behavior: Best bearish pivots occurred at failed reclaims near midday supply and during the post-14:00 breakdown sequence.

green_circles.behavior: Bullish pivots were mostly countertrend bounces; demand reactions failed to produce sustained continuation after the morning.

orange_banks_supply.behavior: Supply near 26120-26160 was respected repeatedly and capped the midday recovery.

blue_banks_demand.behavior: Demand near 26025, 25970, and 25920 was progressively broken; final lower demand near 25890 produced only a closing bounce.

time_markers.10am_blue: Below the open after a volatile opening rejection; price was stabilizing but still weak.
time_markers.12pm_red: Near the recovery high and main failed reclaim zone around 26150.
time_markers.2pm_green: Bearish pivot; price lost balance near 26095 and began the session's strongest downside drive.
time_markers.4pm_yellow: Closed after a late bounce from the low, still much closer to LOD than HOD.

takeaway: Bearish reference day with a volatile open, midday failure at supply, and decisive 14:00 downside expansion into a weak close near the lows.
